description: This file defines functions and mixins for handling responsive breakpoints and media queries in a SCSS project, including calculating next breakpoints, min/max widths, infixes, and media query mixins for different viewport sizes.

methods.name: breakpoint-next
methods.description: Returns the next breakpoint name after the given breakpoint, based on the list of breakpoint names.

methods.name: breakpoint-min
methods.description: Returns the minimum width of the specified breakpoint, or null if it is the smallest.

methods.name: breakpoint-max
methods.description: Returns the maximum width of the specified breakpoint, reduced by 0.02px to account for browser limitations.

methods.name: breakpoint-infix
methods.description: Returns a string with a dash prefix for breakpoints other than the smallest, used for utility class naming.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles for the specified breakpoint and larger viewports.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-down
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles for the specified breakpoint and smaller viewports.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-between
methods.description: Creates a media query spanning between two breakpoints.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-only
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles only within the specified breakpoint range.
